No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to hunger, food security, or agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly includes '創傷記憶' (trauma memory) as a case study, directly linking to mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education and explicitly trains students in professional oral history skills, fostering specialized knowledge (Targets 4.3, 4.4, 4.7).
evidence: 訓練學生具備獨立進行口述訪談的專業素養與能力
掌握口述歷史的方法與運用

Gender Equality.reason: The course explicitly designates '性別' (Gender) as a key theme for case studies, directly contributing to understanding gender issues (Target 5.1, 5.c).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The '經濟' (economic) case studies can explore labor history and working conditions, indirectly contributing to understanding decent work (Target 8.5, 8.8).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Oral history inherently amplifies diverse voices. Case studies on '社會文化' and '性別' directly promote social inclusion and understanding of inequalities (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Oral history, through '社會文化' case studies and '非檔案的史料', directly contributes to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
evidence: 非檔案的史料：文化史的多元資料

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to consumption, production, or waste.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or aquatic life.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Case studies on '政治' (political) topics and '創傷記憶' directly explore conflict, injustice, and institutional impact, contributing to peace and justice (Targets 16.1, 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The theme '口述歷史在台灣/海外' (Oral history in Taiwan/overseas) implies learning about diverse practices and potential knowledge sharing, indirectly relating to international cooperation (Target 17.6).
